one_time_description: Legal claim filed against Government of Canada seeking $30 million in damages for breach of fiduciary duty, breach of contract, interference with economic relations, and negligent misrepresentation related to third-party management period
economic_notes: Nation was under third-party management from July 2006 to October 31, 2018. Has filed $30M legal claim against Government of Canada and two prior third-party managers. Nation receives significant portion of revenue from ISC and is economically dependent on federal government. Not in compliance with First Nations Financial Transparency Act.
notes: Fiscal year is 2020 (ended March 31, 2020) but audit report was signed May 2, 2022 — a significant two-year delay. Nation was under third-party management from July 2006 to October 31, 2018. One subsidiary consolidated: 9231-7387 Quebec Inc. $30M legal claim outstanding against Canada. Not compliant with First Nations Financial Transparency Act. Deferred revenue schedule shows ISC deferred revenue balance of $2,921,930 at year end alongside FNHRDCQ $35,711 and FNEC $373,176. Schedule 3 segment totals differ slightly from consolidated statement totals due to inter-program transfers. No remuneration schedule included in audited statements. Revenue lines extracted from consolidated statement of operations actual column.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
